DLCs.title: Extra Enemies
DLCs.description: Introduces a host of new enemy types, each with unique abilities and behaviors that force players to adapt their combat strategies and master new tactics.

DLCs.title: Extra Characters
DLCs.description: Unlocks a roster of new playable characters, each with distinct abilities, playstyles, and progression paths to expand your approach to combat.

DLCs.title: Extra Maps
DLCs.description: Expands the world with new regions to explore, featuring unique environments, hidden secrets, and fresh challenges that deepen the gameplay experience.

DLCs.title: soundtrack
DLCs.description: Grants access to the full game soundtrack, allowing you to enjoy the atmospheric music anytime outside the game.

DLCs.title: Extra Skins
DLCs.description: Adds a variety of cosmetic skins for playable characters, letting you customize your appearance without affecting gameplay.

DLCs.title: Extra Powers
DLCs.description: Introduces new abilities and skill upgrades that enhance combat depth and allow for more diverse and powerful character builds.

DLCs.title: Revenge of the Damned
DLCs.description: A full story expansion that continues the narrative, introducing new missions, enemies, and challenges as the battle against the demonic forces intensifies.

DLCs.title: Nightmare Mode
DLCs.description: Unlocks an extreme difficulty mode designed for experienced players, featuring tougher enemies, higher stakes, and a true test of skill.
